intro: Ipomoea sabulosa, also known as the beach morning glory, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Convolvulaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Ipomoea sabulosa include alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made from this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
